blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 255 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
